title: Diagnose and Fix Problems
drDigitalIntro:
Something's wrong with the computer — figure out what and fix it!
• Look for clues: is an app frozen? Is the WiFi off? Is there an error?
• Apply what you've learned to get things working again.
• No hints this time — you're the expert now.

playgroundTask.goal: You diagnosed and fixed the problem

steps.say: Something's wrong. Look at the desktop — what's going on?
The app is frozen. Open the system menu to force quit it.
Good — the app is closed. Reopen it from the dock to make sure it works now.

drDigitalSuccess: You identified a frozen app and fixed it with Force Quit! Remember: when an app stops responding, don't panic — open the system menu, force quit it, and reopen it from the dock.
drDigitalHint: Click the frozen window to confirm it's not responding, then use the three-dot menu in the menu bar to find Force Quit.
